title: [Maaghara Labyrinth]
description: A small pool of water has collected in a depression upon the ground, a thick root hanging from the ceiling dripping water into it constantly.  The narrow walls descend to meet the floor in a sharp angle, their surfaces smooth and featureless except for the occasional small rock or root breaking the monotony of packed earth.

wayto.9734: ;e next_exit = { 9823 => [ 'southeast', 'southwest', 'southwest', 'east', 'southwest', 'southeast', 'south' ], 9818 => [ 'east', 'southwest', 'west', 'west', 'northeast', 'northeast', 'northwest' ], 9808 => [ 'east', 'east', 'east', 'northeast', 'west' ], 9788 => [ 'southwest', 'southeast', 'southwest' ], 9784 => [ 'southeast', 'south', 'northeast', 'north', 'west', 'west', 'west' ] }; loop { if move 'go root'; sleep(0.5) until XMLData.room_title == '[Maaghara Tower, Refuse Heap]'; fput 'stand' unless standing?; waitrt?; break; else; if dir_list = next_exit[Room.current.id]; dir_list.each { |dir| move dir }; else; echo 'error: out of cheese'; break; end; end }
